## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (or N/A — explain why).
- [ ] Docs updated where the public surface changed (README, `docs/`, recipes).
- [ ] Conventional commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, `test:`, `chore:` — with `!` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer for breaking).
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build` is green locally.
